title: pseudognaphalium microcephalum
intro: Pseudognaphalium microcephalum, also known as smallhead cudweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium microcephalum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
